auth_required_sync: Sign in to back up your plots to Tracebud.
backup_body_plots: Upload plots and deliveries to Tracebud when you are online.
declaration_audit_body: Export a snapshot of your producer data and plot counts for your records, or send the same snapshot to the Tracebud audit log when signed in.
declaration_export_no_farmer: Set up a producer profile in Register plot first.
declaration_sync_need_signin: Sign in with your Tracebud email and password.
declaration_sync_ok_body: Declaration snapshot was added to the server audit log.
declaration_text: I declare that no forest was cleared on this plot after 31 December 2020.
delete_plot_body: Are you sure you want to delete this plot? All related information and delivery records will be removed.
documents_fpic_body: Minutes, mapping, social agreements, and consent evidence.
documents_labor_body: Photos and documents of working conditions and labor compliance evidence.
documents_my_docs_body: Upload and organize documents for FPIC, land tenure, permits, and labor compliance.
documents_no_farmer: Set up your farmer profile first (register a plot on the Home tab).
documents_no_plots: No local plots yet. Register a plot first.
documents_permits_body: SINAPH buffer-zone permits, management plans, government approvals.
documents_plots_body: Open a plot to manage land title, permits, FPIC repository, and photo vault.
documents_tenure_body: Land titles, customary agreements, municipal letters, witness attestations.
enter_email_password: Enter your Tracebud email and password.
evidence_pick_failed_body: Choose a photo from your library or take a new one instead.
finish_home_first: Finish setup on the Home tab first.
finish_home_photo: Finish setup on the Home tab first — then you can add a profile photo here.
fpic_label: Land is not used without Free, Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC).
harvest_backup_first: Back up this plot on Tracebud before recording a delivery.
harvest_logged_body: Digital receipt created and saved on this device.
harvest_plot_local_badge: On this device only — back up under My Plots to record a delivery online
harvest_share_qr: Share this QR with your buyer
home_action_plot_photos: Plot “{name}” needs real field photos to finish compliance checks.
labor_no_child: No child labor on this plot.
labor_no_forced: No forced labor or human trafficking on this plot.
log_harvest_card_sub: Record weight and generate a compliance receipt for your buyer.
mb_used: {used} MB used by Tracebud on this device
storage_footprint_breakdown: {photos} MB photos · {maps} MB offline maps · {data} MB data
my_plots_empty: No plots on this device yet. Register a plot to map your field with GPS.
name_prompt_body: Shown on delivery receipts and reports.
no_synced_plots: No backed-up plots yet. Go to My Plots and back up first.
onboarding_next_body_name: So your plots and delivery records show the right farmer name on receipts and reports.
onboarding_next_body_plot: Walk around your field with GPS to map the boundary. Works offline — no account needed yet.
perm_camera_body: Allow camera access to take your profile photo.
perm_library_body: Allow photo library access to set your profile photo.
plot_boundary_required_body: Plots of 4 hectares or more need a walked boundary with at least three GPS points.
plot_deforestation_passed_body: No forest loss detected since 31 December 2020
plot_edit_declared_discrepancy: Declared area differs from GPS by more than 5%.
plot_edit_declared_hint: Optional. If GPS area is shown, declared area must be within 5% of it.
plot_geometry_error_body: Could not prepare coordinates for upload.
plot_photo_intro: These timestamped photos are evidence during audits that real farming activity — not deforestation — is taking place.
plot_rename_backend_reason: Plot name updated from plot details in the app
plot_rename_local_only: Renamed on this device only. Could not update the server copy.
plot_saved_sign_in_body: Optional: sign in with your Tracebud account (from your cooperative) to back up this plot online. You need an existing account — wrong email or password will not upload the plot.
plot_still_on_device: Your plot is still saved on this device. Open My Plots to see it.
plot_status_all_done: All checklist items are complete for now.
plot_status_fpic_hint: Upload proof to the FPIC repository for overlapping indigenous areas.
plot_status_ground_hint: Open the photo vault and take one photo for each direction (north, east, south, west).
plot_status_land_hint: Upload cadastral or municipal documents in Land documents.
plot_status_permit_hint: Upload a permit or management plan if overlapping a protected area.
plot_status_remaining_hint: Tap an item to open the section you need.
plot_status_subtitle: What is still needed for compliance on this plot
plot_status_sync_hint: Sign in and back up from My Plots so this plot is saved online.
plot_sync_note: Plot backup uses this account. Sign out to use a different one.
plot_title_upload_prompt: Upload land title and permit proof
plot_upload_network_error: Could not reach Tracebud. Back up this plot from My Plots when you are online.
plot_upload_account_error: Plot saved on this device. Online backup needs a field-app sign-in — open Settings, sign out, then sign in again and tap Sync Now.
plot_upload_server_error: Server rejected the upload. Open My Plots to retry backup.
plot_voucher_body: This QR code is your digital proof of compliance. Share it with any buyer to verify your plot meets EUDR requirements.
plots_empty_body: Register a plot to map your first field.
plots_local_mode: Not signed in — your plots are saved on this device only.
producer_profile_error_uuid: Account setup is incomplete. Check your details and try again.
producer_profile_missing_farmer: Farmer profile is missing. Go back and complete producer profile first.
plot_register_producer_later_body: Required for compliance before declarations. You can also finish this in Settings.
plot_register_producer_incomplete: Choose your crop and add a postal address or GPS point.
record_delivery_sub: Weight + compliance receipt for your buyer
rename_plot_empty: Enter a name for this plot.
select_plot_harvest: Choose the plot for this delivery:
settings_account_signed_out_body: Back up plots when you're online.
settings_api_url_hint: For testing only. Farmers can ignore this.
settings_backup_sync_body: Upload plots, deliveries, and photos to Tracebud when you are online.
settings_vertex_avg_body: When mapping, each boundary point can be averaged over 60 or 120 seconds for better accuracy under tree cover.
sign_in_sub: Use the same email and password as your Tracebud account. Saved only on this device.
sign_in_to_backup_body: Back up plots and deliveries to Tracebud.
simplified_declaration_geo_body: For small operators you may link the simplified declaration to a single GPS point (six-decimal WGS84) instead of or in addition to a postal address.
simplified_declaration_location_denied: Location permission is required to save a declaration GPS point.
simplified_declaration_postal_ph: Village, municipality, department — for simplified declaration
sync_no_farmer_profile: No farmer profile on this device. Finish Home setup first.
sync_plots_already_synced: All plot boundaries are already on the server.
sync_plots_fetch_failed: Could not reach Tracebud while checking plots.
sync_plots_none: No local plot boundaries to upload.
sync_plots_uploaded_all: Uploaded {uploaded} of {total} missing plots to the server.
sync_queue_attempt_scope_smart: Scope: smart sweep (retries then new uploads), cap {cap}
sync_queue_failed_remain: {n} queue item(s) failed — check your connection and try again.
sync_queue_fetch_failed: Could not load server plots — pending deliveries, photos, or documents were not sent.
sync_queue_no_action_selected: Queue retry skipped: no action type selected.
sync_queue_preferences_reset: Queue retry preferences reset to defaults.
sync_queue_sent: Sent {n} pending item(s) (deliveries, photos, or documents).
sync_queue_smart_cap_reached: Smart sweep cap reached in pass 1/2; skipped pass 2/2.
sync_session_expired_short: Session expired. Please sign in again in Settings.
tile_need_plot_body: Map your field before opening this section.
voucher_share_failed: Could not open sharing. Try again.
walk_area_discrepancy_body: GPS area ({gps} ha) and declared area ({declared} ha) differ by {pct}%, which exceeds the 5% tolerance.
walk_averaging_body: Averaging 60–120 seconds to filter multipath errors
walk_capture_intro: Choose how to map your field boundary.
walk_completion_body: Your boundary is saved on this device.
walk_contiguity_body: Fields separated by roads, rivers, or railways must be registered as separate plots with unique GeoIDs.
walk_decl_documents_hint: Supporting documents can be uploaded in the Documents section after registration.
walk_decl_fpic_body: Free, Prior, and Informed Consent obtained from affected communities
walk_decl_labor_body: No child labor, forced labor, or unsafe working conditions
walk_decl_land_tenure_body: I have legal right to use this land (deed, possession, or customary agreement)
walk_decl_no_deforestation_body: This plot has not been deforested after December 31, 2020
walk_declarations_required_body: These attestations are required for EUDR compliance and EU market access.
walk_draw_info: Trace your plot boundary on the satellite map. Pinch to zoom and tap to add vertices.
walk_gps_averaging_body: Each waypoint averages 60+ seconds of readings to handle canopy interference. Walk slowly and steadily.
walk_instructions_body:
1) Wait until GPS signal is Fair or Strong.
2) Tap Start Recording.
3) Walk around the full boundary.
4) Return to the start point to close the shape.
5) Save when the estimated area looks correct.
walk_invalid_boundary_body: The polygon self-intersects. Please walk the perimeter again.
walk_invalid_declared_body: Please enter a positive number for declared hectares.
walk_low_data_desc: Use blank map to reduce data usage; enable offline tiles for full offline maps.
walk_method_centroid_body: Save a single GPS point for very small plots.
walk_method_draw_body: Trace the boundary on a satellite map when walking is not possible.
walk_method_walk_body: Walk around your field with GPS for the most accurate boundary.
walk_photo_vault_body: Take photos in each direction to prove land use during compliance audits.
walk_plot_registration_body: Register your plot for EUDR compliance checks and market access.
walk_plot_saved_point_body: {name} saved using a single GPS fix.
welcome_account_body: Create a free account to back up your plots and share them with your cooperative. You can skip and map your field offline first — sign in anytime from Settings.
walk_plot_updated_point_body: Location saved on this device. Sync from My Plots if this plot was already uploaded.
walk_plot_updated_polygon_body: Boundary saved on this device. Sync from My Plots if this plot was already uploaded.
walk_poor_gps_body: GPS precision is poor. You can still save, but consider walking the perimeter again for better accuracy.
walk_registration_completed_body: Your plot boundary has been captured. Continue to complete required declarations.
walk_size_over_4_body: Walk the full perimeter with GPS.
walk_size_under_4_body: Single GPS point or small walked boundary.
sign_in_backup_partial: {uploaded} backed up, {failed} could not upload. Try Back up in Settings when you are online.
sign_in_invalid_credentials: Could not sign in. Check your email and password — you need an existing Tracebud account (ask your cooperative or contact support@tracebud.com).
sign_in_oauth_failed: Could not sign in with Google or Apple. Try email and password, or ask your cooperative for help.
sign_in_oauth_provider_disabled: Google sign-in is not enabled on Tracebud yet. Try email and password, or contact support@tracebud.com.
sign_in_oauth_needs_signup: No Tracebud account is linked to this Apple or Google sign-in yet. Create an account first — it only takes a moment.
sign_in_apple_not_completed: Apple sign-in did not finish. On iPhone, update the Tracebud app to the latest preview build, then try again. If it persists, check Sign in with Apple is enabled for com.tracebud.app in Apple Developer.
sign_in_oauth_sub: Use Google, Apple, or email — the same Tracebud account as your cooperative dashboard.
declaration_geo_saved_body: Your declaration location is stored on this device.
declaration_geo_saved_hint: Stored on this device for your simplified declaration.
farmer_signup_intro_body: Back up your plots and share them with your cooperative. No company setup.
farmer_signup_name_optional_hint: Optional — we'll use your email address if you leave this blank.
farmer_signup_method_body: Continue with Google, Apple, or email. Your name is filled in automatically when possible.
farmer_signup_email_body: Enter your email and password. Add your name, or we'll guess from your email.
farmer_signup_name_after_oauth_body: We didn't get your name from Apple or Google. Add it for your plot records.
farmer_signup_already_have: Already have an account? Sign in
farmer_signup_confirm_email: Check your email to confirm your address, then sign in from Settings.
farmer_signup_success_body: You are signed in. Your plots will back up when you are online.
